name: dev_Greenova
postCreateCommand: python3 -m venv /workspaces/dev_greenova/.venv && . /workspaces/dev_greenova/.venv/bin/activate && python -m pip install --upgrade pip && pip install -r requirements.txt
postStartCommand: code tunnel service install --no-sleep --accept-server-license-terms --disable-telemetry --name 'dev_Greenova' && . /workspaces/dev_greenova/.venv/bin/activate && set -a && . /workspaces/dev_greenova/.env && set +a
